content_body:
Tucked away off Coopers Creek Road off Hwy 60, you will discover Sea Creek Falls, a stunning 30-foot waterfall with an easy accessible pool at the bottom of the falls. Perfect for families and little legs, this 0.5-mile round-trip hike is a must to explore during your North Georgia getaway to Blue Ridge, GA. 

Cabins close to this waterfall include Serendipity on Noontootla Creek, Cherokee Sunrise on Nootootla Creek, and Aska Escape Lodge
title: Sea Creek Falls
